case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS SAN FRANCISCO CHOCOLATE CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $808.78 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CHOCOLATE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CHOCOLATE CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CHOCOLATE CO. $808.78 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $868.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $97.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CHOCOLATE CO.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO CHOCOLATE CO.
